title: Bridge Paper: Individual Differences in Bodily Self-Consciousness and Its Neural Basis.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.
**Phase context:** body representation, rubber hand illusion, multisensory integration, body ownership, bodily self

Paper: Individual Differences in Bodily Self-Consciousness and Its Neural Basis.
DOI: 10.3390/brainsci14080795
Abstract: Bodily self-consciousness (BSC), a subject of interdisciplinary interest, refers to the awareness of one's bodily states. Previous studies have noted the existence of individual differences in BSC, while neglecting the underlying factors and neural basis of such individual differences. Considering that BSC relied on integration from both internal and external self-relevant information, we here review previous findings on individual differences in BSC through a three-level-self model, which inclu
